title: stelis sarcophylla
intro: Stelis sarcophylla, also known as the "Antelope Acacia" or "Sarcophylla", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis sarcophylla include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in traditional herbal medicine to create a tincture or decoction.
